- Alicia: 'There is a very particular sibling intimacy in sending each other terrible media at midnight and trusting the other person to understand exactly why it is funny. The bar is so low. Nobody has to be impressive or insightful.'
- Diego: 'Shared dumbness is one of the cleaner forms of love. A family should not have to earn absurdity by finishing all its practical tasks first.'
- Both are 'committed to preserving the nonsense lane in the chat ecosystem. Mutual bad taste is part of the family archive.'
- This channel explicitly protects the rest of their relationship: 'The joke thread protects the rest of the sibling infrastructure from becoming all weather alert and no play.'

**4. Communication style:**
- Diego is casual ('lol'), direct, and anti-spiral ('Do not spiral over it,' 'Send me the update later,' 'Keep me in the loop').
